title: A Royal Rajput Wedding
description: A magnificent three-day wedding celebration at the Umaid Bhawan Palace, Jodhpur, capturing regal traditions, vibrant colors, and deep emotions.

title: Neon Dreams: Tokyo Street Style
description: An editorial fashion series shot in the neon-lit alleys of Shinjuku, showcasing avant-garde street style and dynamic urban lighting.

title: Majesty of Maasai Mara
description: A wildlife documentary capture showing the raw intensity of the Great Migration and the majestic apex predators of Kenya.

title: The Swiss Escape
description: A breathtaking cinematic travel film capturing the majestic snow peaks, mirror-like lakes, and peaceful towns of Switzerland.

title: BMW X5: Unleash the Beast
description: A commercial print and video campaign for BMW India, highlighting the powerful performance and luxury details of the X5 SUV.

title: Love in Amalfi
description: A romantic pre-wedding series shot along the stunning coastal cliffs and colorful villages of the Amalfi Coast, Italy.

title: Minimalist Spaces: The Villa
description: An architectural and interior shoot focusing on minimalist luxury design, natural light play, and clean geometry in Alibaug.

title: Golden Hour Portraits
description: A series of high-fashion outdoor portraits focusing on natural light, skin texture, and expressive emotions during golden hour.

title: Apple Watch: Precision & Performance
description: High-end commercial product photography showcasing the sleek design, premium materials, and display of the Apple Watch.

title: The Golden Temple at Dusk
description: A serene, high-exposure landscape shot capturing the spiritual beauty and shimmering reflection of the Golden Temple, Amritsar.

title: Vogue Cover Story
description: High-fashion editorial shot inside a heritage palace in Rajasthan, combining traditional luxury attire with modern aesthetics.

title: DJI Air: Cinematic Flight
description: A collection of top-down aerial shots showing the raw coastline of Goa, creating abstract patterns of ocean waves and sand.

title: A Parisian Romance
description: An intimate and classic pre-wedding shoot set in Paris, featuring the Eiffel Tower, Seine River, and quaint Parisian cafés.

title: Gourmet Gastronomy
description: Fine-dining food photography capturing detailed textures, steam, and rich colors of contemporary Indian cuisine.

title: The Tech Summit 2023
description: Comprehensive event coverage for a global technology conference, focusing on keynote speakers, networking, and candid moments.

title: Midnight Reflections: Mumbai
description: A collection of long-exposure night shots of the Bandra-Worli Sea Link, capturing the trail of car lights against Mumbai's skyline.

title: Water Droplets: Macro
description: Stunning macro photography capturing the intricate refraction of flowers inside morning dew droplets on a leaf.

title: Monochrome Portraits
description: High-contrast black and white portrait session focusing on shadow play, emotional depth, and raw facial features.

title: Tanishq: Golden Heritage
description: Commercial product photoshoot for Tanishq's bridal collection, highlighting complex designs, gold lustre, and gemstones.

title: The Himalayan Range
description: A panoramic landscape showing the sun rising over the snow-capped Himalayan peaks of Ladakh, shot from 15,000 feet.
